segments.text: He has the future eye, future vision on Miya's eyes, he knows when it's coming, grabs the ledge, still a moment into the back throw, sends it back.

full_text: He has the future eye, future vision on Miya's eyes, he knows when it's coming, grabs the ledge, still a moment into the back throw, sends it back.

corrections.original: steal a moment in the back throw
corrections.corrected: still a moment into the back throw
